fields.title: Add spawns restriction field to AgentDefinition
fields.description: ## ProblemnnTau controls subagent nesting only via depth limits and tool allowlists (removing the agent tool entirely). There's no way to say 'this agent can spawn finder and oracle but not deep or smart.' This is a coarse control — either an agent can spawn anything or nothing.nn## SolutionnnAdd an optional spawns field to AgentDefinition, following oh-my-pi's pattern:n- spawns: undefined or '*' → can spawn any agent (current default behavior)n- spawns: [] → cannot spawn any agentsn- spawns: ['finder', 'oracle'] → can only spawn those specific agentsnn## Implementationnn### 1. Type change (src/agent/types.ts)nAdd to AgentDefinition:n```typescriptnreadonly spawns?: readonly string[] | '*';n```nn### 2. Frontmatter parsing (src/agent/parser.ts)nAdd spawns to AGENT_DEFINITION_FRONTMATTER_KEYS and the schema. Accept:n- String '*' (wildcard)n- Array of strings (agent names)n- Omitted (defaults to '*' / unrestricted)nn### 3. Enforcement (src/agent/manager.ts)nIn the spawn path, before creating a worker, check if the parent agent's definition has a spawns restriction. If the requested agent name is not in the allowed list, fail with a clear error.nnThe check needs access to the parent's AgentDefinition. The parent's definition is already tracked since AgentWorker stores its infra.definition. Plumb the parent's spawns restriction into the spawn validation in AgentManagerLive.nn### 4. Agent registry (src/agent/agent-registry.ts)nAllow spawns in settings overrides (user/project settings.json can override spawns per agent).nn### 5. Agent .md filesnNo changes needed to existing bundled agents (finder, librarian, oracle, painter, review) — they default to unrestricted. But document the field in a comment or example.nn## Example frontmattern```yamln---nname: reviewerndescription: Code review agentnmodels:n  - model: inheritntools: [read, bash]nspawns: []  # cannot spawn sub-agentsnsandbox: read-onlyn---n```nn## Quality gatenMUST run 'npm run gate' in extensions/tau/ before declaring done.
fields.notes: Added AgentDefinition.spawns parsing, settings overrides, manager enforcement, and user-facing spawn restriction errors. Added parser/registry tests. npm run gate passed in extensions/tau.
fields.close_reason: Implemented spawns restrictions, settings override support, and verified with npm run gate in extensions/tau.
